name: @soltrade/custody-provider-contract
description: Custody Provider CONTRACT + STUB (Gate E / E2-A): interface/contract only describing a custody provider as an opaque, non-key-exporting, fail-closed component, plus a provider-selection stub that always resolves to an 'unconfigured' provider. NO live calls. No KMS/vault client; no KeyManager; no crypto/signing library; no key material; no transaction building/serialization; no signing/sending; no RPC/provider; no DB; no REAL-LIVE; no execution authority. This package is OUTSIDE the mechanism guard's allowlist and is fully scanned.
